title: World Seed Explorer
subtitle: Input your world generation seed to instantly locate structures and missing biomes via Chunkbase.
label: Minecraft World Seed

chunkbase.title: Chunkbase Map Integration
chunkbase.description: Having trouble finding that elusive Mushroom Island or Snowy Slopes biome? Chunkbase generates an interactive map of your world.
chunkbase.hint: Save a seed first to enable integration
